description: Anti-hallucination guardrails. `lockstepGroups` = files that duplicate logic across your project and MUST be edited together. `highRisk` = path patterns that get a just-in-time caution injected when edited. Consumed by lockstep.mjs (CI/commit gate) and edit-guard.mjs (PreToolUse JIT reminder).

highRisk.note: 💰 Billing/payment path. Reserve → charge → refund order is sacred. Run tests before committing.
🔐 Auth path. Review security implications carefully before editing.
🗄️ Schema migration — additive + ordered. Never edit a shipped migration; add a new numbered one.
